tasks.title: CLAUDE.md + Makefile eval target (self-hosting loop)
tasks.description: Created CLAUDE.md declaring self-hosting behaviour, Makefile with eval/board/install-bats targets, and a PostToolUse Claude Code hook that updates the board timestamp on every agent completion.

tasks.title: install.sh curl install script + docs update
tasks.description: Wrote install.sh (curl/wget, INSTALL_DIR override, chmod +x). Promoted curl one-liner as Option A in getting-started.md, demoting git clone to Option B.

tasks.title: Philosophy section rewrite (TPS mapping, drop Ralph-style)
tasks.description: Replaced 'Ralph-style continuity' jargon with a TPS→software mapping table: Muda→unshipped code, JIT→CI/CD, Jidoka→TDD, Poka-Yoke→typing/linting, Kaizen→Spec Kaizen, One-piece flow→Atomic Specs.

tasks.title: Seed .kaizen/board.html for this repo's backlog
tasks.description: Bootstrapped .kaizen/board.html (dark, Bootstrap 5, SortableJS, WIP limits, CT/LT timers, 5s auto-reload) and tasks.json as the persistent development kanban for this repo.

tasks.title: make board: port fix, --directory, dark theme, network/SSH
tasks.description: Fixed make board: auto port-finding via ss loop (default 8081), --directory flag so python serves .kaizen/ not repo root, dark theme default, network IP + SSH tunnel instructions.

tasks.title: Branch-per-feature workflow in skill (kaizen/* branches)
tasks.description: Updated skill Phase 1 to create kaizen/{feature-slug} branch before any commits; Phase 4 acceptance merges back to base with --no-ff. Resume logic checks current branch.

tasks.title: Kanban UX: scroll, ? tooltips, card hover, favicon, refresh
tasks.description: Scrollable column bodies (max-height calc 100vh-120px), column ? help tooltips, card hover two-column table (status/timestamps/CT/LT), inline SVG favicon (改), navbar 改 icon, manual ↻ refresh button.

tasks.title: GitHub Pages fix: master branch trigger + base URL
tasks.description: Fixed GitHub Pages: docs.yml trigger changed from main→master (repo uses master). Added base: '/kaizen-spec/' to VitePress config so assets resolve correctly on gh-pages subdirectory.

tasks.title: README SVG kanban banner + docs favicon
tasks.description: Created board-preview.svg (dark-theme mock with all four columns, blocked Andon card, CT/LT badges, 改 navbar icon) and added it to README as the above-the-fold banner image.

tasks.title: Playwright regression tests for kanban board (14 tests)
tasks.description: Full Playwright test suite covering all 4 kanban columns: structure, card hover tooltips, column ? tooltips, WIP enforcement, theme toggle. Fixed 2 bugs: col ReferenceError + Bootstrap sanitizer.

tasks.title: GitHub Pages docs site regression test (Playwright)
tasks.description: Playwright test suite for live GitHub Pages site at jackyko1991.github.io/kaizen-spec. Verifies homepage loads, VitePress renders, nav sidebar present, Getting Started page accessible.

tasks.title: render_board.py — tasks.json single source of truth
tasks.description: Python render script reads tasks.json + templates/board.html and generates board.html deterministically. Agents edit JSON only. make board auto-renders before serving. make ci-local added for local Actions testing.

tasks.title: Done column rolling archive (done_visible_max=10)
tasks.description: Render script caps Done column at done_visible_max cards (default 10). Older cards stay in tasks.json for metrics; board shows a faded archive stub. Two new bats tests i3/i4.

tasks.title: Board card on spec commit (Phase 1 immediate)
tasks.description: Skill Phase 1 now creates a backlog card in tasks.json + re-renders board immediately after spec commit. Board is never empty while a spec exists. Phase 3 updated to note card already exists.

tasks.title: Install: curl-only, no git clone
tasks.description: Removed git clone Option B from README and getting-started.md. curl one-liner is now the sole install method. Fixed branch reference main→master in curl URLs. Test g2 updated.

tasks.title: Industrial compliance logging (Q5 + skill + docs)
tasks.description: Add regulatory/compliance option to Phase 1 Q5. Extended log fields: requirement_id, change_type, actor, artifact, justification. Update kaizen-log.md reference doc. Covers ISO 13485, IEC 62443, ISO 9001, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, DO-178C, IEC 61508.

tasks.title: Regression tests for hook live-update fix
tasks.description: Bats tests verifying: hook script exists, fires on tasks.json write, runs render_board.py, skips non-tasks.json files. Guard against the matcher regression (Agent-only) and timestamp-only action.
